title: tragopogon pratensis subsp. lamottei
intro: Tragopogon pratensis subsp. lamottei, also known as Lamb's lettuce or Lamotte's Salsify, is a subspecies of the perennial plant Salsify (Tragopogon pratensis). It is a medicinal plant used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Tragopogon pratensis subsp. lamottei can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or dried and made into capsules, offering a natural remedy for various health issues.
